title: Yuki's Sleepy Heart
synopsis: Little Yuki feels excited and can't fall asleep, but with gentle breathing and cozy comfort, she learns to calm her heart and drift into peaceful dreams.

pages.text: Yuki lay in her soft bed, but her heart was beating fast like a little drum. Tomorrow was her first day at playgroup, and she felt excited and nervous all mixed together. Her tummy had butterflies dancing inside.

illustration.description: A little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lying in bed with her hand on her chest, surrounded by soft watercolor dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars twinkling above, gentle moonlight streaming through the window, ethereal atmosphere with pastel palette
illustration.alt: Yuki in bed with her hand on her heart, surrounded by dreamy purple and blue colors

pages.text: "Mama," Yuki called softly. "My heart won't slow down. It keeps going thump-thump-thump really fast." Mama came and sat on the edge of the bed, her gentle smile making Yuki feel a little better already.

illustration.description: A mother sitting beside a little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes in bed, soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, floating clouds around them, round sleepy faces, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Mama sitting next to Yuki on the bed in soft moonlight

pages.text: "Let's help your heart feel calm," Mama whispered. "Put your hand on your chest and breathe in slowly like you're smelling a beautiful flower." Yuki took a deep breath in, then let it out like a gentle breeze.

illustration.description: A little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes breathing deeply with her hand on her chest, surrounded by soft watercolor dreamy flowers, purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Yuki breathing slowly with imaginary flowers around her

pages.text: "Now let's count our breaths together," Mama said softly. "One... two... three..." With each slow breath, Yuki felt her heart getting quieter and quieter. The excited feelings were still there, but they felt gentler now.

illustration.description: A mother and little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes breathing together, soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing numbers floating in the air, round sleepy faces, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Mama and Yuki counting breaths together with floating numbers

pages.text: Yuki's eyes began to feel heavy like soft clouds. "It's okay to feel excited," Mama whispered. "Your heart knows you're ready for tomorrow's adventure." Yuki smiled sleepily and snuggled deeper into her cozy blankets.

illustration.description: A little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes with droopy sleepy eyes snuggling in bed, soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, floating clouds above, glowing stars, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Yuki getting sleepy and snuggling in her blankets

pages.text: With one last slow breath, Yuki closed her eyes and let her calm heart carry her into sweet dreams. She dreamed of playing with new friends and having wonderful adventures, her heart beating steady and peaceful all night long.

illustration.description: A sleeping little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes peacefully dreaming, soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, floating dream clouds showing happy children playing, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Yuki sleeping peacefully with dream clouds showing happy children playing

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: How did Yuki's heart feel at bedtime?
questions.explanation: Yuki's heart was beating fast like a little drum because she felt excited about her first day at playgroup.

questions.question: What did Mama teach Yuki to do to feel calm?
questions.explanation: Mama taught Yuki to breathe slowly like smelling a flower and count her breaths to help her heart feel calm.

questions.question: Why was Yuki excited?
questions.explanation: Yuki was excited and nervous because tomorrow was her first day at playgroup.

questions.question: How did Yuki feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: By the end, Yuki felt peaceful and sleepy after learning to breathe slowly and calm her heart.
